name: Prompt in a Box
description: A Chrome extension whose entire logic is a prompt. Load prompt.md, run an agent loop on a schedule, act through Chrome APIs granted by the manifest.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.openai.com;
